description_long: This is a single-story green house with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade features a small covered porch with steps leading up to a central door, flanked by two windows with white trim. The siding is horizontal and painted a muted green, giving the house a classic suburban appearance. The roof extends over the entryway, creating a sheltered area supported by simple columns. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible sides, and the rear of the house has a plain design with two windows and no additional ornamentation. The overall structure is compact, with a straightforward rectangular footprint and a modest, inviting entryway.
description: A green, single-story house with a gray gable roof, white-trimmed windows, and a small covered front porch. The design is simple and symmetrical, typical of suburban neighborhoods.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, central door, and two flanking windows.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying two symmetrically placed windows and the plain green siding, with the gable roof visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the extension of the gable roof and two windows on the side wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a side door and two windows, mirroring the window arrangement of the rear.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small covered porch, steps, and a gabled overhang supported by simple columns.
